# Copilot / AI Instructions

This repo is a deliberately silly comedy project. Changes must preserve the "Bureau of Tiny Emergencies" vibe: deadpan official tone, premium UI, punchy jokes.

Guidelines:
- Keep the project lightweight (static HTML/CSS/JS + Remotion). Avoid adding heavy frameworks.
- Avoid serious/earnest tone. No motivational content.
- Prefer small, focused diffs. Don’t refactor unrelated code.
- Don’t introduce tracking, accounts, or data collection.
- If you change `out/daily/*.json` formats, update both `script.js` and `library.js` readers.
- Don’t commit generated one-off audio assets; daily audio is generated at render time.

See `AGENTS.md` and `README.md` for the full spec.
